title: Proposal envelope
x-awen-status: reconciled 2026-07-04 — constitution/interface-layer moderation envelope (interface-contract §3), used by community mapping / Sail / Craffter. NOT an awen-weave craidd shape: the craidd-internal analogues are validate_proposal (claim proposals) and validate_entity_proposal (EP-... entity proposals). Kept as the shared outer envelope; instances MUST NOT fork it.
description: The shared envelope by which any change enters the canonical store: a proposal that is moderated/accepted, never a direct write. Owned by the core; instances MUST NOT fork it (interface-contract §3). Used identically by community mapping (B' submissions), Sail, and Craffter advisory outputs (PRIN-003).

source.description: Who attested — role-based email, or named contact with consent.

attestor.description: Signature / consent record. For magic-link tools this carries the verified identity block.

tool.description: Originating tool slug (e.g. community, cards, sail).

lineage.description: Prior version reference if this is an update (forward-additive; supersede, do not delete).

status.description: Lifecycle. Acceptance is a human/curator act (PRIN-002).

payload.description: Instance-specific content (community mapping: an Organisation/Service/Location record; Sail: a pack input; Town Dataset: a DEC correction). The core does not constrain payload shape beyond requiring it be present.
